title: Sambalpur Heat Wave
lead: Sambalpur is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.46. The city's temperature has reached critical levels with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sambalpur has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 67%, and the wind speed is approximately 13.0 km/h, offering little relief from the heat. 
 The city's Heat Wave Level is classified as CRITICAL, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating a significant departure from normal temperatures.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
